data.Modification: Iodoacetamide derivative/Addition of Glycine/Addition of G
Addition of lysine due to transpeptidation/Addition of K
Loss of arginine due to transpeptidation/Deletion of R
Loss of C-terminal K from Heavy Chain of MAb/Deletion of K
Removal of initiator methionine from protein N-terminus, then acetylation of the new N-terminus
Tyrosine oxidation to 2-aminotyrosine/Conversion of carboxylic acid to hydroxamic acid
DST crosslinker cleaved by sodium periodate

project.title: Analysis of immunoprecipitates of HA-EZH2 in RPMI8226 cells transfected with an HA-EZH2 plasmid using Coomassie blue staining and mass spectrometry.
project.projectDescription: The purpose of this project is to identify proteins that interact with EZH2 in the myeloma cell line RPMI8226, which will further allow us to analyze the downstream molecular mechanisms associated with EZH2.
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Immunoprecipitates of RPMI8226 cells with HA-EZH2 against an anti-HA antibody were subjected to SDS-PAGE gel. Gel bands stained with Coomassie blue were excised separately, alkylated, and digested with trypsin. The tryptic peptides were then analyzed using a nano-LC/MS/MS coupled with an 1100 HPLC system.
project.dataProcessingProtocol: The LC/MS/MS spectra were searched using the SEQUEST software program with the BioWorks Browser (version 3.3.1; Thermo Fisher Scientific) against the NCBI database.
